title: Simon Eskildsen on scaling Shopify, building turbopuffer, and the future of databases
summary: Sualeh Asif interviews Simon Eskildsen on infrastructure scaling at Shopify, the database market cycle, and the role of AI in coding. The discussion covers flash sale outages, engineering principles, and the challenges facing next-generation database companies and AI agents.
